# Templates

This section provides reusable Markdown templates for extending the documentation set in a consistent way.

## Available Templates

- [Standard Template](./standard-template.md)
- [Appendix Template](./appendix-template.md)

## When To Use Them

Use the standard template when creating a new normative document that defines rules, patterns, or mandatory guidance.

Use the appendix template when adding supporting material such as catalogs, examples, mappings, or operational reference content.

## Authoring Rules

- Write in English only.
- Add links to related pages.
- Keep the structure concise and scannable.
- Prefer examples that match the approved naming model.
